title: viola congesta
intro: Viola congesta, also known as Common Dog Violet, is a perennial herb native to Europe and North America, belonging to the Violaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola congesta include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and wounds. Herbal preparations of Viola congesta can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used internally to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
